pages.title: Foundation Core
pages.description: Reusable runtime foundation for screenshot-driven frontend delivery.

sections.title: Attach templates without rebuilding backend infrastructure.
sections.body: Foundation Core centralizes auth, content DTOs, lead intake, preview, media, and operational health.

sections.title: Contracts stay stable while frontend visuals evolve.
sections.body: Screenshot-driven templates consume typed attach contracts instead of internal app modules.

sections.title: Health visibility is built into the root runtime.
sections.body: Readiness signals expose which adapters are configured and which are still in safe fallback mode.

sections.title: Lead intake is ready for contact, quote, and booking flows.
sections.body: Form submissions use normalized envelopes and anti-spam controls so client templates do not duplicate backend logic.

services.title: Foundation Runtime
services.summary: Reusable runtime shell with typed API contracts and health monitoring.

services.title: Template Attach Contract
services.summary: A normalized boundary for screenshot-driven frontend implementations.

faq.title: Does Foundation Core require the DS?
faq.summary: No. It is intentionally independent from Frontend-Master_DS and DS-Planning-Engine.

testimonials.title: Operational confidence
testimonials.summary: Health, preview, forms, and media surfaces are reusable across client deliveries.

posts.title: Planning runtime boundaries
posts.summary: Keep backend operational concerns inside the foundation and public visual work inside template outputs.
